sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36416" key="e)nupo/kritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνυπό-κρῐτος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑποστιγμή</foreign> a stop <sense id="n36416.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put after the protasis,</tr_> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg034:p.24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.24</biblScope> </bibl> H.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνυπόκριτος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
